title: Yasuie’s Execution Shakes Wano
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Orochi, Unknown person #10, Yasuie, Kinemon, Momonosuke as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: Yasuie’s execution exposes Orochi’s cruelty and the tragedy of the SMILE victims in Ebisu Town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Daimyo and people of every town and hamlet took up arms without a moment's hesitation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But before the monster Kaido, revenge was impossible. Wano burned!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: against my will, I lived through it all. I hid away in ebisu town, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to die in silence proved too boring a prospect!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The company is responsible

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I plotted a childish little plan... please, forgive me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Orochi's Cowardice was far more than I could have imagined.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He panicked, and threw every- one with that moon tattoo, itself nothing more than a passing trend, in jail!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WhaaaaAA-?! It was all an oversight by Lord Orochi?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do we do?! We captured so many of these guys!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi! There's rasetsu town!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn and blast you, Yasuieie! I'll perfo- rate your insides!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: There you are, Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's been a long time, hasn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Any last words, Yasuieie?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ok-ohky

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: OROCHI...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's see... allow me to compose a couplet for the curse that Haunts your heart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "A man of small measure

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will never be more than the open he cannot stomach!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Waha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's about it.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: I hope that will suffice, Kinemon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the rest of you nine Red Sheaths!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: You too, future Shogun MOMONOSUKE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: did it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Your plans are now Crystal clear!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi Forces
dialogue.text: I've provided our comrades captured in Rasetsu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: with a new rendezous point.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is about as much as I can do with what life I have left!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, no matter what that coward Crochi complains about, his soldiers will not listen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn, the Shogun's Cowardice really has put us in a pickle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stop that! He'll hear you!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: For twenty years, Kaido's head...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Dad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Has gone unclaimed!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Yasuie?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cover the eyes of your children! The last Daimyo of the Kozuki Shoguns-

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: No! A foolish jester of ebisu town

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will now head into that good night! Singing all the way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GO! GO TO ONIGASHINA!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Avenge our dear Shogun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: and a hip-hip!

dialogue.speaker: Yasuie
dialogue.text: Yasuieleeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll await the good news on the other side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Daddy!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
